question: A company tracks average website sign-ups per year. According to the chart, which of the following statements is true?

options.A: None of the above statements about the full-year trend are supported by the data in the chart.
options.B: The most recent year shows a sharp decline in sign-ups compared to earlier years.
options.C: The most recent year has the lowest sign-ups of the entire period shown.
options.D: The most recent year proves that website sign-ups are now permanently declining.

explanation: The latest year in the chart only includes about 2 months of data, while previous years show full 12‑month totals. Comparing the partial-year value (274 sign-ups) directly to full-year values like 1,633 sign-ups creates the illusion of a sharp decline. We cannot draw full‑year conclusions from this incomplete aggregate.
